text: As agents transform how we build, sell, and serve customers, our new framework reflects that
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: agent force is now deeply embedded across every one of our applications.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: So please review our earnings deck for additional details on this.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: So starting with our durable growth drivers, sales, service, and slack are at the core of the
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: number one agentic CRM, collectively representing more than 60% of Q1 net new AOV.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: A agent force ARR surprised the past the billion dollar mark this quarter.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: Our largest applications, sales and service, saw year over year seat growth
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: with humans and agents both expanding on the platform.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: Bookings for A1E and A4X are premium SKUs anchored in sales and service,
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: including the value from our agentic capabilities grew nearly 60% year over year.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: As customers adopt agent force, they expand across our platform.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: On average, our top 10 customers by Q1AW usage have increased their total
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: sales force spend by 1.5X in the last year.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: And now with Informatica as part of data 360, we're already unlocking synergies with revenue
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: growth accelerating since the acquisition. This is the flywheel we laid out at our investor day
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: and it's working. Those signals show up in the headline numbers. Q1 revenue came in at 11.13
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: billion, up 12% in constant currency ahead of our guide. The outperformance was driven by
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: Informatica's on-prem business and professional services timing. CRPO ended the quarter at 33.6
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: billion, up approximately 13% in constant currency, driven by continued momentum in agent
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: force, data 360 and Slack. Both metrics were partially offset by softness and commerce and in
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: Tableau. We're driving durable growth through operational excellence. We call our internal playbook
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: customer zero. We're our own first customer, leveraging our products to run our business.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: It's how we're building a lean agent to enterprise and driving profitable growth.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: And it is keeping us on track for our FY30 rule of 50 framework. In Q1, AI coding tools enabled us
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: to double the amount of features and code shipped year over year, while simultaneously reducing
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: incidents and defects. Slackbot, which is embedded directly into the flow of work,
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: is now our fastest adopted AI tool in Salesforce's history. Driving 3.8 million hours of annualized
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: productivity gains for our employees. It has become a daily driver of my own productivity as well.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: And discipline execution continues to underpin our responsible capital return strategy.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: Underscoring our confidence in the future, we commence the largest ever 25 billion accelerated
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: share repurchase or ASR, representing half of our 50 billion share repurchase authorization.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: Combined with our buyback program, this reduced Q1 diluted share count 10% year over year.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: Our ASR alone decreased Q1 share count by 103 million shares, representing 11% of shares outstanding.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: And it increased our Q1 non-gap earnings per share and gap earnings per share by 23 cents
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: and 14 cents respectively. Turning to our outlook for the year, building on the momentum from the
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: second half of last year, we expect first half net new ALV growth to outpace ALV growth and drive
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: organic revenue re-acceleration in the second half of FY27. Before discussing the numbers,
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: a few key assumptions in our guide. Our Q2 and FY27 revenue guidance reflect continued momentum
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: in Agent Force, Data 360, and Slack, partially offset by ongoing weakness in marketing and
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: commerce and increased softness in tableau bookings and renewals. We also expect greater license
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: revenue volatility with the addition of Informatica on-print revenue to our business. Now moving to
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: the numbers, we are raising the midpoint of our FY27 revenue guidance to 45.9 billion to 46.2
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: billion. And we continue to expect subscription and support growth of approximately 11% year over
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: year in constant currency. We are reiterating our non-gap operating margin guidance of 34.3%.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: And adjusting our gap operating margin guidance to 20.6%, largely driven by higher restructuring.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: Our recent debt issuance tied to the successful initial delivery of our ASR resulted in an
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: approximately five-point headwind to operating cash flow and free cash flow. As a result, we are
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: updating our guidance for both metrics to grow four to five percent year over year.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: We expect Q2 revenue of 11.27 billion to 11.35 billion, growth of approximately 10% in constant
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: currency. Q2 CRPO growth is expected to be approximately 13% year over year in constant currency.
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: Our guidance reflects the strength of our balance portfolio and reinforces our confidence in our
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

text: second half revenue acceleration, enabling us to achieve our FY30 framework. And looking ahead,
speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER

speaker: ROBIN WASHINGTON - PRESIDENT, CHIEF OPERATING & FINANCIAL OFFICER
